5173.one_line_summary: Future rewards framework for NFT owners, sharing profits across historical holders.
5173.notes: Extends ERC-721 with a multigenerational profit-sharing mechanism via geometric sequences. Uses sliding window to distribute rewards to previous owners when profitable sales occur.

5185.one_line_summary: Controlled NFT metadata updates via recipes and JSONata transformations.
5185.notes: Extends ERC-721/ERC-1155 to allow deterministic, on-chain-traceable metadata updates. Uses JSON transformation engine (JSONata) for controlled evolution of NFT properties.

5187.one_line_summary: Rental extension for ERC-1155 separating usage rights from ownership.
5187.notes: Extends ERC-1155 to enable rentals with expirable usage rights. Supports subletting and renewal; ownership transfers independent of active leases.

5189.one_line_summary: Account abstraction via endorsed operations, using off-chain endorser validation.
5189.notes: Proposes AA without protocol changes using 'endorser' smart contracts to validate operations. Endorsers signal readiness and dependencies; bundlers evaluate and include transactions in mempool.

5192.one_line_summary: Minimal soulbound NFT interface marking non-transferrable tokens.
5192.notes: Minimal extension of ERC-721 using ERC-165 feature detection. Introduces `locked()` function and events to identify tokens as soulbound (non-transferrable).

5202.one_line_summary: Blueprint contract format with on-chain bytecode container for initcode storage.
5202.notes: Defines bytecode preamble (0xFE71...) to mark contracts as initcode blueprints. Enables safe on-chain storage of constructor code with version and data section encoding.

5216.one_line_summary: Granular approval extension for ERC-1155 by token ID and amount.
5216.notes: Extends ERC-1155 with approve/allowance pattern inspired by ERC-20. Enables per-ID, per-amount approvals instead of blanket setApprovalForAll.

5218.one_line_summary: NFT copyright license management with tree-structured sublicenses.
5218.notes: Extends ERC-721 with license hierarchy. Root license transfers with NFT; holders can create sublicenses. All operations traceable via events.

5219.one_line_summary: HTTP-like resource requests from smart contracts via standardized interface.
5219.notes: Standardizes contract resource requests with HTTP-like response codes, headers, and body support. Enables contracts to request data from contracts and facilitates decentralized DApp frontends.

5247.one_line_summary: Executable proposal interface for DAOs and governance contracts.
5247.notes: Defines interface to create and execute proposals on-chain. Decoupled from voting (ERC-1202). Enables function calls bundled with targets, values, gas limits.

5252.one_line_summary: Personal finance contracts with account-bound tokens for self-sovereign asset management.
5252.notes: Extends ERC-5114 with pattern for individual finance contracts + account-bound credentials. Separates investor funds from operator fees; governs via contribution-based voting multipliers.

5267.one_line_summary: Retrieval of EIP-712 domain fields for secure signature verification.
5267.notes: Standardizes eip712Domain() function to publish domain separator fields. Enables wallets/apps to validate and display signing context; supports extensions via EIP numbers.

5269.one_line_summary: ERC detection and discovery by number with caller-aware support query.
5269.notes: Alternative to ERC-165 using ERC numbers instead of selector hashes. Caller-aware, supports minor identifiers for sub-features. Emits OnSupportERC events for discovery.

5289.one_line_summary: Notary interface enabling legally-binding smart contracts via IPFS documents.
5289.notes: Allows contracts to link to legal documents and track signatures. Uses ERC-5568 signals to request wallet signatures. Documents must be permissive, not restrictive.

5298.one_line_summary: ENS trust contract holding NFTs on behalf of ENS domain names.
5298.notes: Enables tokens to be held by ENS domains rather than wallet addresses. Implements ERC-721/ERC-1155 receivers; claimTo verifies ENS ownership before transferring tokens.
